reviewed_sessions.notes: Phase5 review gaps were closed and the Phase5 completion report became commit-visible.
Canonical CI validation path was fixed to validation.yml and duplicate CI ambiguity was removed.
Template gap analysis concluded that existing templates and SOP were sufficient; no additional template expansion was required.
Sandbox implementation was in scope, but main integration required an out-of-scope docs artifact addition.
Handled as a no-op ratification because the required Phase5 report artifact was already tracked on main.
Phase6 failure patterns, root causes, and preventive actions were summarized in a docs-only report.

non_blocking: docs/spec_media_os_profile_capability.md remains untracked and is outside the current Phase6 scope.
The exact historical reason why docs/reports/phase5_completion_report.json was absent on main before session-27 integration is not fully reconstructed.

current_position.summary: Phase6 pilot execution, failure classification, and progress visibility are sufficiently organized to move to the final completion review after session-29 is committed.

next_actions.action: Save this file as docs/reports/phase6_progress_dashboard.json and commit it as session-29.
Run session-30 as the Phase6 completion review based on the current dashboard and prior reports.

final_judgement.reason: Phase6 now has a completed pilot record, a classified failure-pattern summary, and a progress dashboard that makes the current position reviewable.
